rationale: Interpreter shutdown hang due to infinite SDAM monitoring loop; threading/shutdown implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Internal error-parsing bug for mongos error objects; no specific spec requirement contradicted.
API improvement to add JSON helper for Binary/Code types; no spec requirement involved.
Private internal API mismatch between Python and C implementations; not a BSON spec rule violation.
API ergonomics request to add check_keys parameter to save(); no spec requirement involved.
Segfault on invalid BSON input; crash/safety bug, no specific BSON spec rule contradicted.
Pre-spec-era bug: replica set node list incorrectly updated via update() vs replacement; no named spec rule violated.
Feature request to add ObjectId.isValid(); mentions Java driver only as background context, no cross-driver inconsistency.
Performance improvement: replace list.pop() with pointer in Cursor; internal refactor, no spec behavior change.
Feature request to allow direct connection to arbiter for admin commands; no spec requirement.
Pre-spec-era write concern safe=False override bug; write concern spec postdates this; cannot name specific violated spec rule.
Pool test suite fails against mongos because tests use db.eval() unsupported on mongos; test fix, no spec behavior.
Platform workaround for Python 2.5 integer overflow bug on macOS; not a driver spec issue.
Feature improvement: support auth during failover using primary-preferred read preference; no spec rule violated.
Explicitly adds support for Java and C# legacy UUID byte orders so PyMongo can interoperate with those drivers' stored data.
API rename: ttl keyword confusing with TTL indexes; docs/ergonomics improvement, no spec requirement.
Build tooling improvement: better error hints for C extension build failures on Windows/macOS.
Socket not properly closed on exception path (AssertionError: ids don't match); internal socket management bug.
Sockets unnecessarily closed after OperationFailure; connection pool lifecycle bug, no specific CMAP spec rule contradicted.
GridIn missing 'name' alias that GridOut has; internal API inconsistency not tied to a GridFS spec rule.
GridFS metadata set before close not persisted; implementation bug in GridIn flush logic, no spec rule named.
Incorrectly wraps $cmd queries in $query when $readPreference is added; mongos compatibility bug, no specific wire protocol spec rule cited.
addUser on localhost raises spurious OperationFailure despite success; server-side quirk workaround, no auth spec rule violated.
Sharded GridFS intermittent failure; fix is adding partialOk to filemd5 command; implementation bug not contradicting a spec rule.
Add client-side validation of update document keys to prevent dot-in-key upserts; improvement, no spec rule explicitly violated.
Improvement: raise exception on unacknowledged write to secondary/arbiter; proactive enforcement, no spec rule explicitly violated.
Raise ConnectionFailure instead of AutoReconnect on initial connection failure; error type API improvement, no spec requirement.
Tailable cursor doesn't detect server disconnection when cursor id is 0; implementation bug, no spec rule named.
Cursor.clone() returns shallow copy sharing references; internal Python implementation bug, no spec rule involved.
Feature request: add slow_ms parameter to set_profiling_level(); no spec requirement.
Python 3.1 pickle bug workaround for bson.binary.Binary; Python version compatibility, no spec rule involved.
find_and_modify silently mishandles list sort argument; API consistency/validation bug, no CRUD spec rule explicitly contradicted.
start_request() nesting broken when auto_start_request=False; internal socket-pinning implementation bug, no spec requirement.
New write_concern API replacing get/set_lasterror_options; API redesign/improvement, not fixing a spec nonconformance.
Feature request to implement __copy__/__deepcopy__ on cursors; API ergonomics, no spec requirement.
UnicodeDecodeError on non-ASCII hostname in ObjectId machine hash; encoding bug in Python 3, no spec rule violated.
MemoryError on large cursor iteration due to recv buffer size; memory management bug, no spec rule involved.
json_util.dumps doesn't recurse into DBRef; JSON utility bug, DBRef serialization format not defined in BSON spec.
Insert/update/remove return values under-documented; documentation improvement, no spec behavior.
DBRef __eq__ and __ne__ inconsistently defined; Python equality protocol bug, no spec requirement.
SON equality ignores insertion order; internal Python data structure bug; BSON spec does not define SON equality semantics.
Server selection spec defines secondaryAcceptableLatencyMS URI option; driver silently ignores it, violating the spec.
Driver incorrectly sends $readPreference to pre-2.3.1 mongos for PRIMARY mode, violating read preference spec routing rules.
slave_okay=True sends $readPreference: {mode: primary} to mongos; contradicts read preference spec which forbids this for PRIMARY.
Extended JSON spec requires $type as two-char hex string; json_util emits integer instead, explicit spec violation.
BSON datetime encoding corrupts microseconds for pre-epoch dates; BSON spec requires exact UTC millisecond round-trip.
SDAM spec: members not in primary/secondary state must not receive reads; driver erroneously routes reads to recovering members.
SDAM spec requires immediate topology refresh on 'node is recovering' error; driver waits 30s instead.
GridFS.new_file raises DuplicateKeyError instead of FileExists on duplicate _id; implementation exception-mapping bug, no GridFS spec rule.
Cursor.clone() regression: SON hint converted to unordered dict, breaking $hint; internal implementation regression, no spec rule.
